package.name: ur5e_description
package.description: Robot model description files for UR5e + custom hand: - UR5e arm: URDF (robots/ur5e/urdf/), MJCF (robots/ur5e/mjcf/), meshes (DAE/STL/OBJ) - Custom hand: URDF xacro (robots/hand_tmp/urdf/), MJCF (robots/hand_tmp/mjcf/) - Combined: URDF xacro + MJCF scene (robots/ur5e_hand_tmp/)
